cit.basis: Flat 10% CIT (Law No. 24 of 2018) on the foreign (non-GCC) ownership share of profit; wholly Qatari/GCC-owned entities are generally exempt.
cit.note: Administered by the General Tax Authority (GTA). Extractive-sector agreement rates are out of scope for this SME estimator.

wht.note: 5% withholding tax on certain payments to non-residents (Law No. 24 of 2018).

vat.note: Qatar has not implemented VAT as of the target period, though it is a signatory to the GCC VAT Framework Agreement.

personal_income_tax.note: No personal income tax on employment income.

social_insurance.note: Retirement/social insurance applies to Qatari nationals only; expatriates are not covered.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Ownership blend, extractive-sector rates, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
